chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-540 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 2416/25 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 2417/25 4.For orders on CMA 2418/25 5.For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
